MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnover Order, and Order To Appear On A Weekly Basis is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, With Proof Of Service; Memo Of P&A Filed In Support; Declaration Of David J. Cook, Esq. Filed In Support
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnover Order, and Order To Appear On A Weekly Basis is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. The motion was not timely served by mail. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
